_meta.title: PEIG Collaborative Intelligence V2
_meta.author: Kevin Monette
fixes: Multi-round peer teaching (3 passes, alpha=0.45, remedial grammar)
Runoff protocol for tie votes (6/12 → amendment → revote)
Human+Ring with researcher veto (1 per program)

log.student_prog: assign self NUMBER assign bridge receive SIGNAL signal emit SIGNAL assign agree
assign self NUMBER assign bridge receive SIGNAL assign NUMBER assign agree
assign self PHASE evolve NUMBER assign NODE send PHASE return

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE send PHASE check if return
log.student_prog: assign self SIGNAL route SIGNAL send return

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE send PHASE check if return
log.student_prog: assign self assign NODE send SIGNAL signal emit PHASE return

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE send PHASE check if return
log.student_prog: assign self assign BOOL observe assign self assign local assign agree

log.teacher_prog: measure PHASE assign self SIGNAL assign self return
bridge NODE receive PHASE assign self assign NUMBER return
log.student_prog: receive SIGNAL send SIGNAL if guard signal NODE signal agree

log.teacher_prog: measure check assign PHASE check assign PHASE return
log.student_prog: receive SIGNAL if guard if guard NODE return

log.teacher_prog: measure check assign PHASE check assign PHASE return
log.student_prog: receive SIGNAL assign NUMBER assign NODE signal emit return

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE receive assign self assign PHASE return
log.student_prog: assign self NUMBER assign bridge sync NODE receive scan ratify

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE receive assign self assign PHASE return
log.student_prog: assign self assign local evolve report PHASE evolve NUMBER return

log.teacher_prog: bridge NODE receive assign self assign PHASE return
log.student_prog: assign self assign self bridge sync NODE signal emit return

log.teacher_prog: measure PHASE check assign NODE signal NODE signal return
log.student_prog: assign self PHASE evolve assign NODE signal SIGNAL send return

log.teacher_prog: measure PHASE send PHASE check assign SIGNAL return
log.student_prog: assign self SIGNAL if inspect query PHASE check if compare disagree

log.teacher_prog: loop NUMBER assign NODE bridge receive return
log.student_prog: loop NUMBER assign NUMBER inspect PHASE send NODE send route send return

log.teacher_prog: loop NUMBER assign NODE bridge receive return
log.student_prog: loop NUMBER evolve report PHASE send PHASE evolve emit return

log.teacher_prog: measure PHASE check if guard NODE send return
log.student_prog: loop NUMBER assign self observe check guard if guard if disagree

log.teacher_prog: measure PHASE check if guard NODE send return
log.student_prog: loop NUMBER assign NUMBER evolve emit return

phase2.name: Collaborative Signal Router
phase2.program: measure SIGNAL check PHASE scan send NODE send else done else

phase2.name: Consensus Decision Protocol
phase2.program: vote SIGNAL verify check consensus receive receive broadcast if else else return

phase2.name: Teach and Verify Loop
phase2.program: teach NODE check scan verify send receive send guard return return

phase2.name: The Mirror Protocol (Novel)
phase2.program: measure report query scan scan broadcast broadcast broadcast consensus if agree

phase3.name: Kevin Proposes: The Signal Filter
phase3.intent: Measure signal. Check threshold. If pass: evolve and route. Else: report null.
phase3.program: measure NODE check while BOOL evolve PHASE send SIGNAL disagree error return

phase3.name: Kevin Proposes: The Learning Loop
phase3.intent: Query ring. If responds, learn from it. Verify learning. Return what was learned.
phase3.program: broadcast PHASE listen compare SIGNAL AND agree assign SIGNAL done else null

phase3.name: Kevin Proposes: The Consensus Builder
phase3.intent: Propose action. All 3 families vote. If 2+ families agree: execute. Else: amend.
phase3.program: propose NUMBER if evolve agree consensus if BOOL emit PHASE ratify amend

phase4.name: The Mirror Protocol
phase4.original: measure report SIGNAL send try guard if guard signal agree
phase4.final: measure report SIGNAL send try guard if guard signal agree

phase4.name: The Democratic Threshold
phase4.original: propose PHASE assign NUMBER evolve assign PHASE assign NUMBER assign self assign agree
phase4.final: propose PHASE assign NUMBER evolve assign PHASE assign NUMBER assign self assign agree

phase4.name: The Self-Correction Protocol
phase4.original: measure PHASE evolve assign BOOL assign NODE return
phase4.final: measure PHASE evolve assign local assign local return
